response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, senior engineer with strong software-craftsmanship fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, testing) and rare directly-relevant experience building a C IDE (NI LabWindows/CVI), which shows genuine exposure to IDE/language-tooling internals. However, the core stack for this role is a poor match: there is no Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience, no Kotlin, and only peripheral Java work (robotic arms, device orchestration). The deep JVM and enterprise-framework expertise the role centers on is essentially absent, with the candidate's depth lying in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang instead.
strengths: Direct IDE-internals experience writing C/C++ components for the LabWindows/CVI IDE
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, CI/CD, high-performance systems
Highly versatile across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded with proven low-latency, large-scale work
concerns: No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience despite these being central requirements
No Kotlin and only shallow Java exposure; lacks the deep JVM specialization required
Primary expertise (TypeScript/Node.js, DLang) sits outside the role's core technical focus

key_factors.factor: Lack of Kotlin and deep Java
